svg.title: Indian natural gas: supply and demand data

g.text: Indian natural gas: supply and demand data

text.tspan: In 2021-22, reporting was modified to include extracted products in
demand-side data. This effectively means that both now represent
'wet gas' rather than being a comparison of 'wet gas' and 'dry gas'.

g.text: Also included now is own-use of gas by upstream facilities.
@robbieandrew.bsky.social ● Data: PPAC ● MMSCM = Million standard cubic metres
